---
status: public
shortDescription: "The name this is not an expression"
shortCorrection: "Even the name this on its own is an expression"
concepts:
  - Expression
  - Self
related:
- id: NoAtomicExpression
  relation: General case
inOtherPl:
# - pl: JavaScript
#   id: ThisNoExpression
- pl: Python
  id: SelfNoExpression
spec:
- id: jls13
  sections: ["15.8.3"]
plVersion:
# from: jls8
# to: jls14
expressibleInNms:
- id: ExpressionAsTree
  how: atomic expression this
---
In a method body, `this` is not an expression.
It can only be used for the specific purpose
to distinguish instance variable accesses from local variable accesses,
which is useful if instance variables have the same name as local variables.

frontmatter.shortDescription: The name this is not an expression
frontmatter.shortCorrection: Even the name this on its own is an expression
